author: Britney Muller
title: Hot take: GEO and AI SEO are just rediscovering traditional SEO
content: Britney Muller challenges the AI SEO and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) industry narrative, arguing that 'Y'all are just rediscovering SEO by way of AI SEO or GEO. Everyone's acting like optimizing for LLMs is an entirely new discipline that we need to do ASAP. It's not.' She clarifies key differences: getting mentioned by an LLM (without URL) differs fundamentally from traditional URL-based search visibility. Her research emphasizes that every single URL appearing in LLM output comes from search engine APIs (Google or Bing), not native LLM knowledge. This article provides critical perspective that AI SEO optimization builds on traditional SEO fundamentals rather than requiring completely new strategies, helping marketers avoid overcomplicated approaches.
